---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Summary

**One-sentence summary of the feature:**


## Problem / Use Case

**What problem does this feature solve? What's your use case?**


## Proposed Solution

**Describe how you'd like this feature to work:**


## Alternatives Considered

**Have you considered any alternative solutions or workarounds?**


## User Story

**As a [role], I want to [action], so that [benefit].**

Example: *As a Security Manager, I want to schedule patches during maintenance windows, so that I minimize service disruption.*


## Mockups / Examples

**If applicable, add mockups, screenshots, or examples from other tools:**


## Impact / Priority

**How important is this feature to you?**

- [ ] **Critical** - Blocking my adoption of Glasswatch
- [ ] **High** - Would significantly improve my workflow
- [ ] **Medium** - Nice-to-have, would use occasionally
- [ ] **Low** - Interesting idea, but not urgent

**How many users would benefit from this feature?**

- [ ] **Most users** (essential to core workflows)
- [ ] **Many users** (common use case)
- [ ] **Some users** (specific use case)
- [ ] **Few users** (niche use case)

## Additional Context

**Any other context, research, or references:**


## Related Features / Issues

**Are there related features or issues?**

- Related to #123
- Blocks #456
- Depends on #789

---

**For Glasswatch Team Use:**

- **Product Priority:** [P0 / P1 / P2 / P3]
- **Estimated Effort:** [S / M / L / XL]
- **Target Release:** 
- **Assignee:** 
- **Status:** [Backlog / Under Consideration / Planned / In Progress / Shipped / Won't Fix]
